sglang.title: Optimize Qwen3-moe model by using flashinfer fused allreduce
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to make qwen moe model leverage FlashInfer fused_allreduce to fuse allreduce+rmsnorm+residual_add.
The E2E input throughput improved 2.2%. Currently use a small MoE model so the speedup is slightly, larger 235B model can gain better performance. Will try and update the report.

sglang.author: acelyc111
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The histogram buckets for metrics prompt_tokens_histogram and generation_tokens_histogram are fixed, they may not match the real usage. For example, the generare tokens are averaged to 20k which is larger than the max fixed bucket, i.e. 10k, this cause the P99 always to 10k, which can't

sglang.title: fix 3fs zerocopy
sglang.author: pansicheng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In the page_first zero-copy scenario, the attention key and value caches are stored separately in 3FS on a per-page basis. This layout necessitates special handling for prefix hashing.

vllm.title: Use hidden_size_per_head as head_size fallback
vllm.author: nopperl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some models (such as PLaMo2.1) use hidden_size_per_head as head_size. Additionally, the hidden_size_per_head is not equal hidden_size // num_attention_heads. This PR ensures the correct head_size is returned for these models.
For PLaMo2.1, this led to a crash due to the wrong KV cache page size bein

vllm.title: [Perf] Freeze core engine proc heap after init
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This avoids all of the "static" objects being traversed during garbage collections of the oldest generation, which reduces the pause times when they occur.
We already do this in the API server process, but it can't harm to also do it in the process where the scheduler and kv cache manager run, since

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR brings openai-harmony tool support and reasoning for /chat/completions.
vllm serve openai/gpt-oss-120b -tp 2 --tool-call-parser openai --reasoning-parser openai_gptoss --enable-auto-tool-choice
Currently, it is yet to support tool='required'
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: [XPU][P/D] Add XPU support in NixlConnector
vllm.author: zhenwei-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Support PD disaggregation on XPU based on #18293
Utilizing CPU memory as a buffer and performing point-to-point transmission via NIXL
Limitation

XPU attn kernels only support NHD layout.

Example
pip install nixl==0.3.0

# prefill node
ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:0 VLLM_USE_V1=1 VLLM_NIXL_SID
